div.div:
Note:
* V2X ECU configures the modern via QMI (control path) and receives V2X messages (warning obstruction).
* V2X feed simple json information to ADA ECU.
* ADA ECU performs crux work ( sensor + video processing, detect obstruction in LOS + obstruction information from V2X)
* ADA ECU feeds warning summary messages to IVI ECU.
